race.comment: ZOUCRATIC (3) resumed for the new yard with a solid effort over this trip at Port Macquarie and is a second-up winner with strong provincial form. Is capable of using the inside gate to advantage and is well placed to win.  DUB (2) resumes seeking the hat-trick. Was backed off the map over 1300m at Armidale last time, and he flies this course and distance. Should be further improved and maps well. ENNIROC (4) will be fitter and has won 2/2 second-up. His best efforts have been in town, and that form stacks right up. DUNSTALL THE GUN (8) was a winner over 1600m at DUBbo last time, dropping out early before coming home with a powerful run to score by 1.75 lengths. Drops back to a sprint, freshened up 54 days and has been kept up to the mark with a Scone trial. Will come late and is a value proposition.
